summary: Frontend-only verification for the newly added Thompson Square Medical Centre logo in header and footer. All acceptance criteria pass: header logo image loads (naturalWidth=500, alt='Thompson Square Medical Centre logo') and is visible both over the dark hero (top of page) and after scroll (light header); footer logo loads (naturalWidth=500) with correct alt; no broken images anywhere on the page (7/7 loaded); regression checks all pass (nav-about/services/doctor/reviews/location present with correct hashes, header-call-btn is a tel: link to 9058781977, logo-link href='#top' and clicking scrolls back to top after dismissing welcome modal, welcome modal opens on load and can be closed via its X button, nav-services click updates location.hash to '#services').
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx and Footer.jsx logo uses className 'scale-[1.7]' inside overflow-hidden white chip. Rendered logo looks fine at desktop 1920x900. No accessibility issues – alt text is meaningful. No functional regressions.

Welcome modal (Radix Dialog) auto-opens on page load and its overlay intercepts pointer events. This is expected behavior but worth remembering for any future automated tests – always dismiss the modal (Escape or close button) before clicking header/nav elements. Not a bug.
test_credentials: None - static public site, no auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React landing page. Frontend URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Welcome modal auto-opens on load – dismiss before interacting with header/logo. Logo image URL: customer-assets.emergentagent.com/.../soym51h7_Thompson_Square_Medical_Centre_logo... (500x500 PNG, loads fine). data-testids in header: site-header, logo-link, nav-about, nav-services, nav-doctor, nav-reviews, nav-location, header-call-btn, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-call-btn. Footer testids: footer-call-btn, footer-directions-btn.
